Notice Of Motion And Motion To Permit Service Of Subpoena Without A Consumer Notice
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vladie P. Viltman, Esq. of the Law Office of Brian E. Soriano, Tel. No. 415.593.7333, appearing for Plaintiff Mikhail Brodsky;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Matter called.

There being no other appearance, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on Plaintiff Mikhail Brodsky's Motion To Permit Service Of Subpoena Without A Consumer Notice as follows: The motion is granted. Plaintiff may serve a subpoena on Yelp without a consumer notice. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)
